name: io.github.holetron/hindsight-mempalace
title: Hindsight MemPalace
description: Self-hosted long-term memory for AI agents over MCP — hierarchical recall backed by pgvector

environmentVariables.name: HINDSIGHT_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Hindsight API (self-hosted). Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:5100.

environmentVariables.name: MEMPALACE_BANK
environmentVariables.description: Default memory bank ID for retain/recall.
